description: Case style: Analog watch with steel round caseDial style: White dial with silver handsStrap style: Dark pink genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Three chronograph time displays, date apeture on the 4 hour mark and indiglo night lightWater resistant to 100 M, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 year
